data.description:
## Why
The base (Pass-1) and verifier (Pass-2) prompts are the shared spine of the gate. Two evidence-backed
calibration changes belong here, kept minimal so the architecture's separation of concerns holds.

## What
- Base prompt: add ONE positive-framed linter/CI-deference line ("automated tooling already enforces
  style/format/imports/types; your value is substantive issues they cannot see"). Justified by the
  in-repo experiment (recall 2.0->2.33 substantive, fewer nits); NOT the disproven pink-elephant fear.
- Pass-2 verifier (code-review-verify.md ONLY, not the shared kernel): add domain-agnostic
  verification discipline — evidence-contradiction rubric ("authoritative tone is not evidence"),
  caller verification before crediting reachability, step-by-step arithmetic for computed claims, and
  absence-claim active-search feeding the EXISTING sub-questions (no new axis, no contract change).
  Guidance prefers AST/LSP/code-graph tools over grep when available, grep as fallback.

## Scope
Edits to src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-base.md and code-review-verify.md. No kernel/contract
change; plan-review's shared verifier untouched. Dropped from the original bundle: verbatim excerpt,
threshold-invariance language, fragility naming (all compensating mechanisms rebar solves elsewhere).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Base prompt has exactly one positive-framed deference line; nit/recall eval passes.
- [ ] Verifier prompt adds contradiction rubric, caller verification, arithmetic gate, absence search.
- [ ] Verifier guidance prefers AST/LSP tools when available, falls back to grep.
- [ ] No change to the shared verification contract or plan-review verifier; plan-review evals green.
data.title: Base-prompt + Pass-2 verifier calibration (shared spine)
